personal.name: Anton Alonso
personal.title: Frontend Developer
personal.summary: Passionate about building modern and scalable interfaces using Angular and web technologies.
about: I am a full-stack developer with over 5 years of experience in creating modern and scalable web applications. My expertise includes building intuitive front-end interfaces with Angular, SCSS, and Tailwind CSS, as well as developing robust back-end systems with Spring Boot.

I specialize in integrating powerful technologies such as PostgreSQL and Oracle to create seamless user experiences. With a strong focus on efficiency and scalability, I use tools such as Docker and Git to optimize workflows and deployment.
Committed to excellence and driven by curiosity, my goal is to create high-impact digital solutions, build web experiences, and continuously improve my skills.

experience.description: Development of desktop and web applications using Java, Maven, and Angular.
Development of web applications with Java, Spring Boot, and Angular. Interface adaptation to improve user experience. Performance and security optimization.
